'''鈭歵h-p-k-l''' ('''kathapkeloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:imbathe|imbathe]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-p-k-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:imbathe|imbathe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-p-k-l
|-
! Lemma
| kathapkeloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithapkeloko|thithapkeloko]] || [[word:jithapkeloko|jithapkeloko]] || [[word:shithapkeloko|shithapkeloko]] || [[word:kithapkeloko|kithapkeloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthapkeloko|thuthuthapkeloko]] || [[word:jujuthapkeloko|jujuthapkeloko]] || [[word:shushuthapkeloko|shushuthapkeloko]] || [[word:kukuthapkeloko|kukuthapkeloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthapkeloko|thuthapkeloko]] || [[word:juthapkeloko|juthapkeloko]] || [[word:shuthapkeloko|shuthapkeloko]] || [[word:kuthapkeloko|kuthapkeloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthapkeloko|thuthapkeloko]] || [[word:juthapkeloko|juthapkeloko]] || [[word:shuthapkeloko|shuthapkeloko]] || [[word:kuthapkeloko|kuthapkeloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethapkeloko|thethapkeloko]] || [[word:jethapkeloko|jethapkeloko]] || [[word:shethapkeloko|shethapkeloko]] || [[word:kethapkeloko|kethapkeloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothapkeloko|thothothapkeloko]] || [[word:jojothapkeloko|jojothapkeloko]] || [[word:shoshothapkeloko|shoshothapkeloko]] || [[word:kokothapkeloko|kokothapkeloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothapkeloko|thothapkeloko]] || [[word:jothapkeloko|jothapkeloko]] || [[word:shothapkeloko|shothapkeloko]] || [[word:kothapkeloko|kothapkeloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothapkeloko|thothapkeloko]] || [[word:jothapkeloko|jothapkeloko]] || [[word:shothapkeloko|shothapkeloko]] || [[word:kothapkeloko|kothapkeloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙thapkeloko|th忙thapkeloko]] || [[word:j忙thapkeloko|j忙thapkeloko]] || [[word:sh忙thapkeloko|sh忙thapkeloko]] || [[word:k忙thapkeloko|k忙thapkeloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathapkeloko|thathathapkeloko]] || [[word:jajathapkeloko|jajathapkeloko]] || [[word:shashathapkeloko|shashathapkeloko]] || [[word:kakathapkeloko|kakathapkeloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathapkeloko|thathapkeloko]] || [[word:jathapkeloko|jathapkeloko]] || [[word:shathapkeloko|shathapkeloko]] || [[word:kathapkeloko|kathapkeloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathapkeloko|thathapkeloko]] || [[word:jathapkeloko|jathapkeloko]] || [[word:shathapkeloko|shathapkeloko]] || [[word:kathapkeloko|kathapkeloko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shathapkelithi|shathapkelithi]] || [[word:shathapkeliji|shathapkeliji]] || [[word:shathapkelishi|shathapkelishi]] || [[word:shathapkeliki|shathapkeliki]]
